transactions.description: Toronto Blue Jays signed free agent RHP Matt Bowman to a minor league contract.
RHP Matt Bowman assigned to Buffalo Bisons.
Worcester Red Sox sent RHP Tyler Uberstine on a rehab assignment to Greenville Drive.
Buffalo Bisons sent C C.J. Stubbs on a rehab assignment to FCL Blue Jays.
Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Dylan Cease on the 15-day injured list. Left hamstring strain.
RHP Harrison Cohen assigned to Somerset Patriots from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
